---
title: "Báo cáo Tồn kho tấm pin"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
css: styles.css
date: '`r format(Sys.Date(), "%d/%m/%Y")`'
---

<style type="text/css">
  body{
  font-size: 13pt;
  font-family: Serif
}
</style>

<style type="text/css">
.main-container {
  max-width: 80% !important;
  margin: auto;
}
</style>

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
#library(plyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(repr)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)
library(highcharter)
library(readxl)
library(shiny)
#library(shinydashboard)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(formattable)
library(scales)
library(crosstalk)
library(reactable)
library(stringi)
#library(rgdal)
library(ggthemes)
library(ggiraph)
library(googlesheets4)
library(shinydashboard)
library(shinyWidgets)

writeLines(
  paste0('{"buildTime": "', format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"), '"}'),
  "last-build.json"
)
```


```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
nv_aio <- read_excel("data/nv_aio_bc.xlsx")
ton_di_duong <- read_excel("data/ton_di_duong_bc.xlsx")
ton_wms <- read_excel("data/ton_wms_bc.xlsx")
ton_chuanhap <- read_excel("data/ton_chuanhap.xlsx")
khu_vuc <- read_excel("data/ton_chuanhap.xlsx", sheet = "Sheet2")
nv_b2b <- read_excel("data/ton_chuanhap.xlsx", sheet = "B2B")
now <- format(
  as.POSIXct(Sys.time(), tz = "Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh"), 
  "%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S"
)
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
nv_aio <- left_join(nv_aio, khu_vuc, by = "ma_moi")
ton_di_duong <- left_join(ton_di_duong, khu_vuc, by = "ma_moi")
ton_di_duong$Loai_kho <- "CNCT"
ton_wms <- left_join(ton_wms, khu_vuc, by = "ma_moi")
nv_b2b <- left_join(nv_b2b, khu_vuc, by = "ma_moi")
ton_chuanhap$Loai_kho <- "CNCT"
```


```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
ton_wms %>%
  group_by(ma_moi, KV, Loai_pin) %>%
  summarise(tong_ton_wms = sum(so_pin),
            kho_kv_wms = sum(so_pin[Loai_kho == "KV1" | Loai_kho == "KV2" | Loai_kho == "KV3"], na.rm = TRUE),
            kho_cnct_wms = sum(so_pin[Loai_kho == "CNCT"], na.rm = TRUE),
            kho_ttqh_wms = sum(so_pin[Loai_kho == "TTQH"], na.rm = TRUE),
            kho_cn_wms = sum(so_pin[Loai_kho == "CN"], na.rm = TRUE),
            kho_cn_coHD_wms = sum(so_pin[Loai_kho == "CN" & so_HD > 0], na.rm = TRUE)) -> ton_wms_bc

ton_di_duong %>%
  group_by(ma_moi, KV, Loai_pin) %>%
  summarise(tong_ton_diduong = sum(so_pin_hd),
            kho_cnct_diduong = sum(so_pin_hd[Loai_kho == "CNCT"], na.rm = TRUE)) -> ton_diduong_bc

ton_chuanhap %>%
  group_by(ma_moi, KV, Loai_pin) %>%
  summarise(tong_ton_chuanhap = sum(so_pin),
            kho_cnct_chuanhap = sum(so_pin[Loai_kho == "CNCT"], na.rm = TRUE)) -> ton_chuanhap_bc
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
nv_aio %>%
  group_by(ma_moi, KV, Loai_pin) %>%
  summarise(tong_so_HD = sum(so_HD),
            tong_gtri_HD = sum(gtri_HD)/10^6,
            tong_pin_b2c = sum(so_pin_hd),
            so_HD_tamung = sum(so_da_tam_ung),
            so_pin_tamung = sum(so_pin_tam_ung)) -> nv_aio_bc

nv_b2b %>%
  filter(hang_hethong != "Đã xuất ra công trình") %>%
  group_by(ma_moi, KV, Loai_pin) %>%
  summarise(tong_pin_b2b = sum(so_pin)) -> nv_b2b_bc
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
###BẢNG TỔNG HỢP
tong_ton <- full_join(ton_wms_bc, ton_diduong_bc, by = c("ma_moi", "KV", "Loai_pin"))
tong_ton <- full_join(tong_ton, ton_chuanhap_bc, by = c("ma_moi", "KV", "Loai_pin"))
tong_ton[is.na(tong_ton)] <- 0
tong_ton <- tong_ton %>%
  mutate(tong_ton = tong_ton_wms + tong_ton_diduong + tong_ton_chuanhap,
         ton_kv = kho_kv_wms,
         ton_cnct = kho_cnct_wms + kho_cnct_diduong + kho_cnct_chuanhap,
         kho_cn_noHD = kho_cn_wms - kho_cn_coHD_wms)

tong_ton <- tong_ton[c(1:3, 14, 4, 10, 12, 15, 16, 7, 8,9,17)]

tong_ton <- full_join(tong_ton, nv_aio_bc, by = c("ma_moi", "KV", "Loai_pin"))
tong_ton <- full_join(tong_ton, nv_b2b_bc, by = c("ma_moi", "KV", "Loai_pin"))
tong_ton[is.na(tong_ton)] <- 0
tong_ton <- tong_ton %>%
  mutate(tong_pin_can = so_pin_tamung + tong_pin_b2b,
         du_pin_saucap = tong_ton - tong_pin_can)
tong_ton <- tong_ton[-c(14:17)]

tong_ton <- tong_ton %>%
  mutate(ma_moi = case_when(
    ma_moi == "COV1-Công ty CP Công trình Viettel" ~ "COV1",
    ma_moi == "COV2-Công ty CP Công trình Viettel" ~ "COV2",
    ma_moi == "COV3-Công ty CP Công trình Viettel" ~ "COV3",
    TRUE ~ ma_moi
  ))

tong_ton <- tong_ton %>%
  filter(Loai_pin != "TCT_Pin khác" & Loai_pin != "CN_Pin khác" )

tong_ton <- tong_ton %>% arrange(Loai_pin, KV, ma_moi)

tong_ton %>%
  group_by(Loai_pin) %>%
  summarise(tong_ton = sum(tong_ton),
            tong_ton_wms = sum(tong_ton_wms),
            tong_ton_diduong = sum(tong_ton_diduong),
            tong_ton_chuanhap = sum(tong_ton_chuanhap),
            ton_kv = sum(ton_kv),
            ton_cnct = sum(ton_cnct),
            kho_ttqh_wms = sum(kho_ttqh_wms),
            kho_cn_wms = sum(kho_cn_wms),
            kho_cn_coHD_wms = sum(kho_cn_coHD_wms),
            kho_cn_noHD = sum(kho_cn_noHD),
            so_pin_tamung = sum(so_pin_tamung),
            tong_pin_b2b = sum(tong_pin_b2b),
            tong_pin_can = sum(tong_pin_can),
            du_pin_saucap = sum(du_pin_saucap)) -> tong_ton_x
tong_ton_x$ma_moi <- "Tổng"
tong_ton_x$KV <- "Tổng"
tong_ton_x <- tong_ton_x[c(16, 17, 1:15)]
tong_ton <- rbind(tong_ton_x, tong_ton)
```


## <span style="color: #C35817;font-family: cambria;">**I. TỒN KHO TẤM PIN ĐẾN ** <strong>`r now`</strong></span>
### <span style="color: #C35817;font-family: cambria;">**1. Tổng quan**</span>

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
kq1x <- unlist(tong_ton[1])
kq2x <- unlist(tong_ton[2])
kq3x <- unlist(tong_ton[3])
kq4x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),4]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq5x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),5]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq6x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),6]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq7x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),7]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq8x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),8]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq9x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),9]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq10x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),10]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq11x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),11]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq12x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),12]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq13x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),13]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq14x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),14]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq15x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),15]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq16x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),16]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq17x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),17]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")

tong_ton_tb <- data.frame(kq1x,kq2x, kq3x, kq4x,kq5x,kq6x,kq7x,kq8x,kq9x,kq10x,kq11x, kq12x,kq13x,kq14x,kq15x,kq16x,kq17x)
tong_ton_tb[4:17] <- lapply(tong_ton_tb[4:17], as.numeric)
rownames(tong_ton_tb) <- NULL
```

```{r,out.width = '150%', echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(reactable)

loai_pin_values <- sort(unique(tong_ton_tb$kq3x))

update_footer_js <- "
function updateFooters() {
  setTimeout(function() {
    var state = Reactable.getState('tong_ton_table');
    if (!state || !state.sortedRows) return;
  }, 150);
}
"

filters <- tagList(
  tags$script(HTML(update_footer_js)),
  div(
    style = "display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: flex-end; margin-bottom: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap;",
    div(
      style = "width: 250px;",
      tags$label("Loại pin", style = "font-weight: bold; display: block; margin-bottom: 4px;"),
      tags$select(
        id = "filter_loai_pin",
        style = "width: 100%; padding: 6px 10px; border: 1px solid #ccc;
                 border-radius: 4px; font-size: 14px; height: 34px;",
        onchange = "Reactable.setFilter('tong_ton_table', 'kq3x', this.value || undefined);",
        tags$option(value = "", "-- Tất cả --"),
        lapply(loai_pin_values, function(v) tags$option(value = v, v))
      )
    ),
    div(
      style = "margin-top: 20px;",
      tags$button("\U0001f504 Reset",
        style = "padding: 6px 14px; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid #ccc;
                 border-radius: 4px; background: #f5f5f5; font-size: 14px;",
        onclick = "
          document.getElementById('filter_loai_pin').value = '';
          Reactable.setFilter('tong_ton_table', 'kq3x', undefined);
        "
      )
    ),
    div(
      style = "margin-top: 20px;",
      tags$button("\u2b07 T\u1ea3i Excel",
        style = "padding: 6px 14px; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid #28a745;
                 border-radius: 4px; background: #28a745; color: white; font-size: 14px;",
        onclick = "window._taiExcel && window._taiExcel(this)"
      )
    )
  )
)

shiny::fluidRow(
  shiny::column(
    9,
    filters,
    reactable(tong_ton_tb,
              elementId = "tong_ton_table",
              minRows = 3, width = 1720, height = "auto", pagination = FALSE, groupBy = "kq2x",
              columnGroups = list(
                colGroup("Tổng tồn kho", columns = c("kq3x","kq4x","kq5x","kq6x","kq7x"), sticky = "left",
                         headerStyle = list(color = "white", background = "#F56222", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center")),
                colGroup("Loại kho", columns = c("kq8x","kq9x","kq10x","kq11x","kq12x","kq13x"), sticky = "left",
                         headerStyle = list(color = "white", background = "#009900", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center")),
                colGroup("Số pin cần cấp", columns = c("kq14x","kq15x","kq16x","kq17x"), sticky = "left",
                         headerStyle = list(color = "white", background = "#3333CC", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"))
              ),
              resizable = TRUE, searchable = TRUE,
              bordered = TRUE, highlight = TRUE, style = list(fontSize = "16px"),
              rowStyle = JS("
  function(rowInfo, state) {
    // Hàng tổng: KV = 'Tổng' → chữ đỏ
    if (rowInfo.values['kq2x'] && rowInfo.values['kq2x'].toString().startsWith('T\u1ed5ng')) {
      return {
        color: '#CC0000',
        fontWeight: 'bold',
        background: '#FFF5F5',
        borderTop: '2px solid #CC0000',
        borderBottom: '2px solid #CC0000'
      };
    }
    // Group rows khác
    if (rowInfo.subRows && rowInfo.subRows.length > 0) {
      return { backgroundColor: '#FFFFFF', fontWeight: 'bold', color: '#000000',
               borderLeft: '2px solid transparent', transition: 'background-color 0.2s ease' };
    }
    // Leaf rows
    return { borderLeft: '2px solid #ffa62d', backgroundColor: '#f5f5f5',
             transition: 'background-color 0.2s ease' };
  }
"),
              theme = reactableTheme(
                headerStyle = list(background = "#F56222"),
                rowStyle = list(`&:hover` = list(backgroundColor = "#FFE4CC !important", cursor = "pointer"))
              ),
              defaultColDef = colDef(
  style = list(whiteSpace = "nowrap"),          # ← cell không wrap
  headerStyle = list(
    whiteSpace = "normal",                       # ← header wrap
    wordBreak = "break-word",
    textAlign = "center"
  )
),
              striped = FALSE,
              columns = list(

                kq1x = colDef(name = "Mã tỉnh",
  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#F5DEB3", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
  aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) { return values.join(', ') }"),
  aggregated = JS("function(cellInfo) {
    return React.createElement('span', {
      title: cellInfo.value,   // tooltip xem đầy đủ khi hover
      style: {
        cursor: 'help',
        fontWeight: 'bold',
        whiteSpace: 'nowrap',
        overflow: 'hidden',
        textOverflow: 'ellipsis',
        display: 'block',
        maxWidth: '100px'
      }
    }, cellInfo.value);
  }"),
  style = JS("
    function(rowInfo, state) {
      if (rowInfo.subRows && rowInfo.subRows.length > 0) {
        return {
          cursor: 'help',
          fontWeight: 'bold',
          backgroundColor: '#f5f5f5',
          textDecoration: 'underline dotted',
          whiteSpace: 'nowrap',
          overflow: 'hidden',
          textOverflow: 'ellipsis'
        };
      } else {
        return {
          backgroundColor: '#f5f5f5',
          whiteSpace: 'nowrap'
        };
      }
    }
  "),
  align = "left", width = 100),

                kq2x = colDef(name = "KV",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#F5DEB3", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  cell = JS("function(cellInfo) {
                    return '<span title=\"Group ' + cellInfo.value + '\">' + cellInfo.value + '</span>' }"),
                  html = TRUE, aggregate = "count", align = "left", width = 150),

                kq3x  = colDef(name = "Loại pin",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#F5DEB3", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "count", align = "right", width = 90),

                kq4x  = colDef(name = "Tổng tồn kho",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#F5DEB3", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100,
                  format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE)),

                kq5x  = colDef(name = "Tồn trên WMS",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#F5DEB3", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100,
                  format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE)),

                kq6x  = colDef(name = "Tồn đi đường",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#F5DEB3", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100,
                  format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE)),

                kq7x  = colDef(name = "Chưa nhập kho",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#F5DEB3", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100,
                  format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE)),

                kq8x  = colDef(name = "Kho KV",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#C8E2B1", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 90),

                kq9x  = colDef(name = "Kho CNCT",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#C8E2B1", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100,
                  format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE)),

                kq10x = colDef(name = "Kho TTQH",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#C8E2B1", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100,
                  format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE)),

                kq11x = colDef(name = "Kho cá nhân",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#C8E2B1", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100,
                  format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE)),

                kq12x = colDef(name = "Kho CN có HĐ",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#C8E2B1", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100,
                  format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE)),

                kq13x = colDef(name = "Kho CN không HĐ",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#C8E2B1", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100,
                  format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE)),

                kq14x = colDef(name = "B2C đã tạm ứng",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#BFCAE6", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 90),

                kq15x = colDef(name = "B2B",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#BFCAE6", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100),

                kq16x = colDef(name = "Tổng pin cần",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#BFCAE6", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 90),

                kq17x = colDef(name = "Dư pin sau cấp",
  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#BFCAE6", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100,
  format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE),
  style = JS("
    function(rowInfo) {
      var val = rowInfo.values['kq17x'];
      if (val < 0) {
        return { background: '#FFE5E5', color: '#CC0000', fontWeight: 'bold' };
      } else if (val > 0) {
        return { background: '#E5F5E5', color: '#006600', fontWeight: 'bold' };
      }
      return {};
    }
  "))
              )
    )
  )
)
```
